title: Black Glitter Wired Ribbon 63mm x 9m Sparkly Mesh Wide Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, Wreaths, Bow Making, Home Decor, DIY Crafts
features: Glitter Ribbon: The mesh-structured ribbon adorned with sparkling sequins, adding a beautiful and elegant touch to your decorations and gifts.
Material: Made of polyester with a shimmering effect, sturdy and attractive, sturdy and long-lasting. It serves as a sparkling decoration for bows, display wreaths, and Christmas trees.
Size: The sparkly ribbon width about 63mm, each roll measures approximately 9m in length. The ribbon is wound onto the roll for convenient storage and use.
Wired Design: The edge of the sparkle ribbon is equipped with soft iron wire, allowing you to easily shape and secure your favourite shapes, easy to cut, process and form.
Wide Application: Suitable for making big bows, gift wrapping, garland decoration, table decoration, Christmas tree decoration, staircase railing decoration and more DIY crafts and home decoration.
Please Note: The style 1 comes with a large number of sequins, and some sequins may shed during handling.
description: Uiopa Glitter Wired Ribbon 63mm x 9m Sparkly Mesh Wide Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, Wreaths, Bow Making, Home Decor, DIY Crafts Specifications: Material: Polyester, Wire Width: About 63mm Length: About 9m per Roll Color: Available in 18 Color Options Package Includes: 1 x Glitter Wired Ribbon Features: - Made of polyester, with a soft and sturdy texture. - The shiny finish elevates the application of decoration to a whole new level. - The wire edges are easy to plasticize and maintain the shape you want. - Multiple colors are available to meet your color needs. - Delivers stunning results whether used in DIY crafts or decorative purposes. Suitable for: - Gift box wrapping, gift basket packaging, Christmas gift decorations. - Wreath decorations, Christmas tree ornaments, porch decorations. - DIY bows, home decor, holiday decorations, and more applications. Note: 1. Due to manual measurement, there may be some errors in the size. 2. Due to the difference of different monitors, there may be slight color difference.
